overview: Use the Registrar's Office as the official starting point for transcript requests
The Registrar's Office is the official Morgan path for enrollment verification questions and record-verification procedures.
Graduation clearance and final record-processing questions should start with the Registrar's Office and the official graduation records path.
Transfer credit evaluation questions should go to the Transfer Evaluation Office when students need to know how prior coursework fits Morgan degree progress.

column8: students should start with the Registrar's process path and confirm deadline or approval details through the official registration workflow.

overview: For registration overrides or permission barriers
column8: start with University Advising or the department that owns the course so the student can be directed to the right approval path.

overview: Students requesting accommodations should start with Accessibility Support Services for documentation
Students struggling academically should start with Student Success and Retention or CASA for the official support and referral path.
